properties.title: Sierra Leone National Health Facilities Dataset Version 01
properties.description:
The data is available in both spatial and tabular file formats.

Coordinate system: GCS WGS 1984

For full methodological details, please see data release notes available for download here.

Download the data as a zip file.

Copyright 2023. Sierra Leone Ministry of Health and Sanitation (MoHS) and Trustees of Columbia University in the City of New York.

Dataset citation:

Sierra Leone Ministry of Health and Sanitation (MoHS) and Center for International Earth Science Information Network (CIESIN), Columbia University. 2023. Sierra Leone National Health Facilities Dataset Version 01. Palisades, NY: Geo-Referenced Infrastructure and Demographic Data for Development (GRID3). https://doi.org/10.7916/ag19-s334.
